codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 4 issues with PROPOSED_FIX and 1 OBSERVATION_ONLY. (1) Line number drift: second fixed call is at current line 195 not 194 (comment shifted it) — addressed by running grep -n to confirm actual lines. (2) grep -cP '^python3' only proves no column-1 bare calls — addressed by supplemental grep -n 'python3' confirming all 3 occurrences are venv-wrapped. (3) 'No files modified' claim is imprecise for untracked files — noted, verdict wording updated. (4) Minimality claim not independently evidenced — noted as per dev report (untracked file has no git diff). (5) OBSERVATION_ONLY: full test run is good but static verification is the real proof.
